hero.bullet1: When you need to preserve capital safely
hero.bullet2: When your assets should work and generate income

sections.aboutTitle: SafeEra — your private advisor on international investment property.
sections.aboutP1visible: We help Ukrainian investors place capital safely and transparently in the Cyprus, Georgia and Dubai markets.
sections.aboutP1hidden: Our guidance begins with your first inquiry, continues through the deal, and stays with you after it closes.
sections.aboutP2: We know that behind every investment there is a specific life objective: protect capital from risk, set up passive income, or obtain international status and freedom of movement.
sections.aboutP3: That is why we don't just sell square metres — we build a personalised strategy around your goal and handle every legal and technical process end to end.
sections.marketsLead: Each market solves a different investor problem. We only work where we have trusted partnerships with developers.
sections.ctaSub: Leave your contact — we'll respond within one business day for a complimentary 30-minute consultation.
sections.midsiteTitle: One client. Shared goal. Full guidance.
sections.midsiteSub: Every step — from the first call to the handover of keys — is carried by the same team.
sections.partnersBody: Every partner has been through a real deal with us. Not through a pitch deck — through a signed contract.
sections.clientFormBody: Leave your contact and a short brief. We'll respond within one business day.

s01.title: Investment strategy
s01.desc: First we learn the goal — then we find the solution. Objective, budget, market and exit before choosing the first property.

s02.title: Asset selection
s02.desc: A shortlist of 3–5 options matching your parameters. No mass database, no pressure — only what makes sense for you.

s03.title: Legal guidance
s03.desc: Title due diligence, contract, registration. Your lawyer on the ground — not our partner on paper, but a real person on your side.

s04.title: Tax navigation
s04.desc: Full tax information before signing the deal, not after the fact.

s05.title: Residency / Visa
s05.desc: Cyprus, Georgia, UAE — we find the right option for your case together with our specialised partner.

s06.title: Asset management
s06.desc: After the keys are handed over, the asset keeps working. We monitor — you receive the report.

w01.title: Your brief first
w01.desc: First we figure out what you actually need — then we search the market.

w02.title: Boutique scale
w02.desc: One partner from the first call to closing — no handoffs between managers.

w03.title: The deal is just the start
w03.desc: We stay in touch after — for the next step, for asset control, for an honest answer when you need one.

w04.title: Honesty
w04.desc: If the asset or jurisdiction doesn't fit — we say so plainly.

w05.title: We understand your context
w05.desc: We know how to work with Ukrainian investors abroad.

w06.title: Vetted partners
w06.desc: Every developer on our list has been through a thorough personal vetting.

cyprus.name: Cyprus
cyprus.sub: British legal system. European status for the whole family. Tax optimisation.

georgia.name: Georgia
georgia.sub: High profitability and payback. Simple registration and investment protection. Favourable tax regime and residency.

dubai.name: Dubai
dubai.sub: Tax haven for capital. Full investor protection. High liquidity and dollar peg.

formClient.msgPh: A short brief: goal, budget, horizon...
formClient.policy: By submitting you agree to the processing of personal data.
formClient.successBody: We'll be in touch within one business day.

formPartner.msgPh: Short note: company, current projects, type of collaboration

cy.h1: Cyprus — your asset at the heart of the EU.
cy.whyTitle: European guarantees on the Mediterranean coast.
cy.whyLead: Cyprus is a full EU member with an English-language Common Law system. That makes the market legible for Ukrainian investors and protected for the long horizon.
cy.typesTitle: Assets we work with on the market.
cy.darkBody: Fast-track pathway (Category 6.2): decision within 2–6 months of submission. Covers the family: primary applicant, spouse, and unmarried financially dependent children under 25.
cy.d1d: Investment of €300,000+ in new property + verified annual income ≥ €50,000 from outside Cyprus.
cy.d2d: Permanent PR, the right to reside in Cyprus, eligibility for citizenship after 7 years of legal residence.
cy.d3d: Visit Cyprus at least once every 2 years. The investment must be maintained: sale is only possible with simultaneous reinvestment in a qualifying property.
cy.formBody: Leave your contact — get a 30-minute consultation to discuss your inquiry. Complimentary.
cy.b01d: Jurisdiction with European guarantees. Investment protection at the level of EU directives.
cy.b02d: English-language legal system. Contracts and courts in a format global investors understand.
cy.b03d: Marriott, Wyndham, Radisson, YOO on the coast — managed-income assets with transparent reporting.
cy.b04d: Become a tax resident in 60 days. Non-Dom status — 0% on dividends and passive income for 17 years.
cy.b05d: Double-taxation and investment-protection treaties with Ukraine.
cy.b06d: After 7–8 years of legal residence — eligibility for Cyprus (EU) citizenship.

ge.h1: Georgia — the easiest entry into international property.
ge.whyLead: Georgia is the simplest market for a first international purchase. Transparent process, no restrictions on foreigners, short path to income.
ge.typesTitle: Assets we work with on the market.
ge.darkBody: Ranges based on real partner cases 2024–2025. A specific forecast for your asset is built after shortlist and management-company alignment.
ge.darkDisc: Ranges depend on season, location, management fee and occupancy. Not a yield guarantee.
ge.d1d: Short-term rental in season + long-term off-season. Gross yield at verified locations — 7–10%, up to 12% in premium seafront segments. Net income after management costs — individual per asset.
ge.d2d: Price growth from foundation to keys (18–36 months) on vetted partner projects. Market price growth in Batumi was 10–14% annually in 2023–2025. Result for a specific asset depends on developer, location and entry timing.
ge.d3d: We only work with management companies that provide monthly reports, open a bank account, and pay income in the investor's currency.
ge.d4d: Resale on the secondary market or transition to passive income after amortisation — chosen together at the start. Exit strategy is set before the deal, not after.
ge.formBody: Leave your contact — get a 30-minute consultation to discuss your inquiry. Complimentary.
ge.b01d: The lowest entry across our markets. Suits a test entry and diversification. For residency — from $150k.
ge.b02d: Deal registration — 1–7 days. No quotas, no foreigner restrictions, no mandatory residency.
ge.b03d: Seasonal rental in Batumi and Tbilisi: gross yield 7–10% at verified locations, up to 12% with short-term management.
ge.b04d: Georgia residency — after purchasing property from $150k (market value per appraisal). No mandatory stay.
ge.b05d: Georgia resident: 5% on residential rental income. 1% — for small business as sole proprietor (separate instrument). Simple filings.
ge.b06d: English-speaking notaries, digital property registration. Deal flows fast and transparent.

ae.h1: Dubai — tax-free investments in a global hub.
ae.whyTitle: A tax-free hub with deep liquidity.
ae.whyLead: Dubai is one of the most liquid real-estate markets in the world. It has grown 15–25% annually since 2020.
ae.typesTitle: Assets we work with on the market.
ae.darkBody: The Dubai Golden Visa is the longest residency in the region. Covers the holder, spouse, children of any age, parents and household staff.
ae.d1d: Property investment of AED 2,000,000+ (~$545,000). Single asset or several combined.
ae.d2d: 10 years of residency with automatic renewal. Right to open a business, bank accounts, and sponsor family.
ae.d3d: UAE resident — 0% income tax. Tax-residency certificate from 90 days (with property) or 183 days of presence.
ae.formBody: Leave your contact — get a 30-minute consultation to discuss your inquiry. Complimentary.
ae.b01d: UAE residents pay 0% on salary, dividends, capital gains and rental income.
ae.b02d: One of the most liquid property markets in the world. Sale in 2–8 weeks on hot locations.
ae.b03d: The market has grown 75%+ since 2020. Annual growth of 10–17% over 5 years. Early-entry edge still holds.
ae.b04d: A hub between Europe, Asia and Africa. 8-hour flight to 2/3 of the world's population.
ae.b05d: Unique concentration of branded projects: Armani, Bulgari, Four Seasons, Ritz-Carlton.
ae.b06d: Dubai is a city where 90%+ of the population are expats. Constant demand for long-term rental without seasonal dependency. Minimum lease — 12 months. Two half-yearly payments are the market standard. Your asset generates stable income.
